databaseQueries.query: SELECT `case_id`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `pest`, `confidence`, `severity`, `date_detected`, `area`, `image_path`, `validation_status` FROM `pest_and_disease` WHERE `latitude` IS not NULL and `longitude` IS not NULL and `validation_status` = 'approved'

SELECT `soil_analysis`.`id`, `soil_analysis`.`farm_id`, `soil_analysis`.`farm_name`, `soil_analysis`.`date_collected`, `soil_analysis`.`ph_level`, `soil_analysis`.`nitrogen`, `soil_analysis`.`phosphorus`, `soil_analysis`.`potassium`, `soil_analysis`.`organic_matter`, `soil_analysis`.`recommendation`, `farms`.`latitude`, `farms`.`longtitude` as `longitude`, `farms`.`farmer_address_bgy` as `barangay`, `farms`.`farmer_address_mun` as `municipality` FROM `soil_analysis` inner join `farms` on `soil_analysis`.`farm_id` = `farms`.`id` WHERE `farms`.`latitude` IS not NULL and `farms`.`longtitude` IS not NULL
SELECT distinct `name` FROM `pest_and_disease_categories` WHERE `type` = 'pest' and `name` IS not NULL
SELECT distinct `name` FROM `pest_and_disease_categories` WHERE `type` = 'disease' and `name` IS not NULL
SELECT `id`, `farm_name` as `name`, `latitude`, `longtitude` as `longitude`, `farmer_address_bgy` as `barangay`, `farmer_address_mun` as `municipality` FROM `farms` ORDER BY `farm_name` ASC

SELECT `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` FROM `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` WHERE `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (3) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'
SELECT * FROM `agricultural_professionals` WHERE `agricultural_professionals`.`user_id` = 3 and `agricultural_professionals`.`user_id` IS not NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` FROM `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` WHERE `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` in (3) and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'
